title: thelypteris beddomei
intro: Thelypteris beddomei, also known as the Beddome's maiden fern, is a species of fern native to the Western Ghats in India. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris beddomei include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris beddomei are often made into decoctions, powders, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
